Structure# Mach.Port

iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+Mac Catalyst 17.4+macOS 14.4+tvOS 17.4+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 10.4+

```
struct Port<RightType> where RightType : MachPortRight
```
